positive: A celestial neon jellyfish floating through an abstract nebula. The jellyfish body is rendered in deep sapphire and turquoise silhouettes, contrasting sharply against a vibrant, gradient background of cosmic plum, electric lavender, and glowing magenta. Style is ethereal neo-noir mixed with stained-glass art; high contrast and crisp linework are essential. Composition must be central, featuring a strong, elegant silhouette of the jellyfish against the swirling nebula background. The overall look should mimic a sophisticated, limited-palette vector graphic suitable for screen printing on dark apparel. Focus on negative space and clean outlines. Geometric patterns subtly incorporated into the nebula tendrils.
negative: blurry, sketch, signature, watermark, text, logo, grainy, low resolution, noise, bad anatomy, extra limbs, mutated, poorly drawn, photorealism, bokeh, gradient fade, cluttered background
